creator: h.freshports@skarnell.se
text:
I've been running unifi in a jail for a long time. After upgrading the jail to FreeBSD 13.3 this service no longer starts. The pid file is created, but nothing else.
I have tried to create a new fresh jail in order to experiment. If I try to run the command manually, i.e., running the '/usr/local/openjdk17/bin/java -Xmx1024M ... -jar lib/ace.jar start' from the unifi directory everything works fine. I do not know why the service do not work. Nothing in the logs. If I roll back to FreeBSD 13.2 everything works great. What is wrong here?
